generator.prompt:
Flat graphic logo for "Emberleaf Teas" — Artisanal loose-leaf tea blending and sales. The logo should feature a simplified, flat emblem of a stylized tea leaf or a small tea plant, paired with 'Emberleaf Teas' as a clear, elegant wordmark. It should use 3-4 flat colors from the palette, avoiding gradients for clean vectorization.
Wordmark text reading EXACTLY "Emberleaf Teas" beneath a simple flat emblem.
Colors strictly limited to: #4A5F4B, #C77C5F, #F5EFE6. Plain white background, centered composition,
3-5 flat solid colors, crisp shapes, no gradients, no shadows, no photo elements, no extra
text besides the brand name. Style: the slightly-soft look of an AI chatbot-generated logo.

entries.input_requirement: Intended brand colours / target hex for colour-accuracy fix — confirm

generator.prompt:
Output the brand color spec for Emberleaf Teas as JSON:
{"brand": "Emberleaf Teas", "colors": [{"name": "...", "hex": "...", "usage": "emblem|wordmark|background"}],
"notes": "exact hexes the vector output must match after tracing"}.
Use exactly these palette colors: #4A5F4B (Ember Green), #C77C5F (Terracotta Blush), #F5EFE6 (Cream Brew).
